    Constructor
    Description
     
    ChatRequest(String prompt, List<ChatRequest.ChatMessage> messages, Options options, Context context)
    Creates an instance of a ChatRequest record class.
     
    ImageRequest(String prompt, Integer width, Integer height, Options options, Context context)
    Creates an instance of a ImageRequest record class.
     
    InternalChatRequest(String prompt, List<InternalChatRequest.ChatMessage> messages, Options options, Context context)
    Compact constructor — defensively copies the message list.
     
    InternalImageRequest(String prompt, Integer width, Integer height, Options options, Context context)
    Compact constructor — validates the prompt is non-null and non-blank.
     
    InternalSpeechRequest(String text, Options options, Context context)
    Compact constructor — validates the text is non-null and non-blank.

    Creates an instance of a SpeechRequest record class.
